description: A bounded governance authorization attempt aggregating a sequence of events.
title: Governance Episode

@id.description: An Internationalized Resource Identifier (IRI). May be a full IRI or a compact IRI (CURIE) resolved by the JSON-LD context.

couplingProxy.description: Composite measure of scale and structural heterogeneity of governance coordination demands.
couplingProxy.title: Coupling Proxy

domainHeterogeneity.description: Simpson-style diversity index measuring how evenly partners are distributed across domains.
domainHeterogeneity.title: Domain Heterogeneity

governanceEpisodeType.description: The type of governance authorization attempt.
governanceEpisodeType.title: Governance Episode Type

layerHeterogeneity.description: Simpson-style diversity index measuring how evenly partners are distributed across institutional layers.
layerHeterogeneity.title: Layer Heterogeneity

normalizedBurden.description: Time to delivered value per unit of coupling load.
normalizedBurden.title: Normalized Burden

partnerCount.description: Number of governance-relevant institutional actors in this episode.
partnerCount.title: Partner Count

project.description: The project this episode belongs to.
project.title: Project

stall.description: Whether the episode shows sustained governance engagement but no qualifying durable authorization.
stall.title: Stall

t0.description: Timestamp of earliest event indicating entry into an approval workflow.
t0.title: Episode Start

t1.description: Timestamp of earliest qualifying authorization event for core scope.
t1.title: First Durable Authorization

t2.description: Timestamp of earliest analytic output answering a stakeholder question.
t2.title: First Delivered Value

tau1.description: Calendar days from episode initiation to first durable authorization.
tau1.title: Authorization Latency

tau2.description: Calendar days from episode initiation to first delivered analytic output.
tau2.title: Time to Delivered Value
